name: Ad Hominem
quote: You're stupid, so your argument is wrong.

name: False Equivalence
quote: Apples and oranges are basically the same fruit.

name: Hasty Generalization
quote: I met one rude person from that country, so they're all rude.

name: Strawman
quote: You want to ban all cars? So you want everyone to walk everywhere?

name: False Cause
quote: It rained after I washed my car, so I caused the rain.

name: Equivocation
quote: A bat is an animal, and a bat is a sports equipment, so they're the same thing.

name: Loaded Question
quote: Have you stopped beating your wife?

name: Circular Reasoning
quote: Video games cause violence because violent people play video games.

name: Begging the Question
quote: Cats are superior to dogs because they're better.

name: Appeal to Authority
quote: Einstein said this, so it must be right about everything.
